reviews.title: Great hotel

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: El hotel se ve que es nuevo y las istañaciones esán genial. Recibimos un trato genial por parte del personal. Fueron muy amables y serviciales. ¡Muy recomendable!
reviews.negatives: Esta un poco lejos del centro de Ninh Binh, pero siempre puedes dar un paseo o pedir un taxi o grab para desplazarte.

reviews.title: Ninh Bình 3N2Đ

reviews.title: Décevant
reviews.positives: Propre et assez confortable
reviews.negatives: 1ere chambre changée cause odeur cigarette très forte. Emplacement au milieu de nul part. Bruit de travaux dans l’hôtel à partir de 07:50 du matin!! Intolérable! En plus beaucoup de bruit venant du couloir (musique d’ambiance trop élevée, mouvement du personnel…). Personnel de la réception ne parle pas anglais… ce qui est étonnant. Beaucoup d’eau sort de la douche.

reviews.title: Quiet Stay Close to Hoa Lu Old Town
reviews.text:
We stayed at Moma Paris Hotel in Ninh Binh for 2 nights and wished we had stayed longer. The area has so much to explore, especially for nature lovers. The hotel is in a quiet location, within walking distance of Hoa Lu Old Town — though in the August heat, we opted for a quick 3-minute Grab ride in the evening. Within two blocks of the hotel, there are also nice restaurants and cafés to enjoy.

Our room was clean and comfortable, and the hotel arranged an excellent private driver for our transfers at a good price. Breakfast was okay, but given the abundance of fresh fruit in Vietnam, it was a pity not to have fresh juice or milk for non-Asian guests to enjoy with their coffee. My main suggestion would be for reception staff to speak at least basic English to better cater to international guests, as communication in person was quite difficult. Overall, a pleasant stay in a great location for exploring Ninh Binh.

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.positives:
L’hôtel est à 2 rues du boulevard donc au calme. Nous avons pu ouvrir la fenêtre sans avoir de bruits (c’était la semaine de la fête de têt donc peut être moins de voiture que d’habitude). Nous avons même entendu le coq :).
Très bonne literie, chambre spacieuse et claire. Équipement complet.
Merci beaucoup à Linh qui fut très accueillante (quel sourire et professionnalisme), c’est l’image de l’hôtel!. Linh nous a rendu beaucoup de services (lingerie, réservation d’un taxi pour notre retour à Hanoi la veille de Tet. 
Merci au cuisinier pour ses omelettes et gentillesse.
Tout fut vraiment parfait.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: The hotel room was clean and bed mattress was comfortable. The breakfast didn't look good, and we did not try it and preferred to eat out. The reception staff did not know English; however Google Translate does its job very well and had no issues.

reviews.negatives: 저녁에 정전이 되기도 하고 위치는 별로 좋지않다

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I went with a close friend and found the room relatively acceptable. Since I am meticulous and prefer everything to be brand new, I felt that the towels did not quite meet my expectations. It would be good to add razors as well, everything else was super complete. I appreciate the decor, especially the very smooth drawers. I really like it. Good service, nice staff, and room cleaning daily as needed. I really love it. For the price, I rate Moma Paris quite highly. Also, this place is very convenient for going out to various spots, close by, and many cars (the cars arrive very quickly, so everyone should book once they're done).

reviews.negatives: Cảm giác thiếu chuyên nghiệp trong công tác set up phòng. Quầy ăn sáng sơ sài, có ruồi nhỏ nhiều ở rổ rau sống nên ăn khá ngại.

reviews.title: Suitable accommodation

reviews.negatives: Không có nước nóng, mình có bật công tắc nóng lạnh, chờ nước để tắm nhưng kqua k có nước nóng để tắm. Mình book phòng có ăn sáng, nhưng sáng dậy thì thấy khách sạn không phục vụ ăn sáng và cũng không phản hồi với khách.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Central location, near the ancient Hoa Lu streets, making it easy to move to tourist attractions. The room is not very spacious but clean, new, and quite fragrant, making it very comfortable to stay. The hotel receptionists are also very nice.

reviews.title: Bình thường
reviews.positives: Phòng đầy đủ tiện nghi
reviews.negatives: Bữa sáng phải trả thêm phí chứ không bao gồm như giới thiệu. Mình đến check in sớm thì lễ tân báo phòng mình đặt khách chưa out giờ muốn in thì phải lên hạng phòng. Trong khi trc khi đến 1 ngày mình đã nhắn khách sạn giờ mình đến và lễ tân cũng ok sẽ giữ phòng để mình check in sớm. Phòng lên hạng không rộng lắm, wc bố trí khá chật chội. Trên giường có tóc rụng. Trải nghiệm khá bình thường k xứng vs giá lắm. Nếu quay lại NB mình sẽ không chọn ks này nữa.

reviews.title: We will come back someday

reviews.title: Moma Paris
reviews.text: The room is very nice, suitable for couples and families with young children, clean space, and modern equipment. The staff are enthusiastic and attentive; I arrived early before check-in and they still assisted me in checking in early without any charge. With a price of over 500 for one night, it's a great deal. The hotel is close to the walking street of Hoa Lu, but if you walk back late, the road might be a bit dark (for those driving their own cars, you can drive over and park outside the old town for 10,000 VND per trip).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the city center, very close to Kỳ Lân Lake and the pedestrian street. The facilities are still quite new. The only issue was that the shower faucet in my room leaked when turned on, which was a bit inconvenient. The room is spacious, with a wide wardrobe and a safe, but the towels looked a bit old and discolored, so I didn't dare to use them. I hope the hotel regularly replaces the towels; the room is nice, but seeing towels that aren't white detracts from the experience. In the morning, there is a simple buffet. This hotel does not support issuing VAT invoices if guests book through Agoda, which is something to note for those traveling for business who need to send invoices to their company because they do not assist with this. The front desk staff communicated at an acceptable level, but I think they need to be more welcoming to guests. When I didn't receive assistance, I felt a bit disappointed because I had previously stayed at another hotel in NB where VAT was handled normally. Apart from this, the hotel is quite a decent place to stay, 8/10.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, mọi thứ ok nhân viên nhiệt tình. Tuy nhiên chăn drap vẫn còn vệt bẩn cái này mình cũng kd khách sạn nên hiểu do quá trình giặt ủi, gấp lưu trữ để va quẹt. Chú ý kĩ hơn sẽ không dính bẩn như vậy nữa. Buffet nên trang bị đèn hâm nóng để đồ ăn không lạnh khô mất ngon. Cho điểm tuyệt đối để ủng hộ

reviews.title: Great trip
reviews.text: I stayed at the hotel for 2 nights, the room was nice and the amenities comfortable. The price was quite reasonable and the location was close to the dining center and the old town. I arrived at the hotel early in the morning, thank you to Oanh, the receptionist, for enthusiastically assisting me with the procedures to store my luggage. Dung provided useful information about travel and dining locations. I am very satisfied with the service you provided.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch, thoải mái, lễ tân thân thiện

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text:
Advantages:
- The hotel is newly built, clean, well-equipped, located in a residential area so it's a bit quiet, but there are still a few restaurants nearby with good grilled dishes, mainly close to the ancient town of Hoa Lư.
- The staff is friendly and enthusiastic, especially the two male staff and the long-haired younger sister.

Disadvantages:
- The pressure of the spray nozzle is too strong, making it feel like I'm getting emergency treatment, quite scary.
- The breakfast has few dishes but it's okay to eat.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn ở vị trí di chuyển thuận lợi, rất mới và sạch sẽ. Nhân viên hỗ trợ nhiệt tình, đặc biệt anh Thái lễ tân còn rất vui vẻ giới thiệu những địa điểm du lịch cho khách hàng. Nếu có dịp đến Ninh Bình sẽ quay lại Moma Paris.

reviews.title: Good clean hotel.
reviews.text:
Advantages
- The hotel is newly built, clean, comfortable, located in a residential area, so it's a bit quiet, but there are still a few eateries nearby, including some good grilled food places, mainly near Hoa Lu Old Street.
- The staff is friendly and enthusiastic, especially the two male staff and the girl with long hair.
Disadvantages:
- The water pressure from the spray nozzle is too strong, making it feel like a rescue operation; it's quite scary.
- The breakfast menu has few items, but the food is okay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Vị trí tốt, rất gần khu phố cổ chỉ cách khoảng 10p đi bộ
Khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Family Trip
reviews.text: Check-in at 18:30. Like a new 4-star hotel, the room is very clean and the decoration is very nice. It is very close to find food near the hotel and a 15-minute walk to Ninh Binh Walking Street.

reviews.title: Nhân viên hỗ trợ cực kì nhiệt tình. Mình xin check in trước 2 tiếng và check out muộn 1 tiếng
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng đầy đủ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This hotel is truly worth the money with a great location, providing good amenities and very dedicated staff. The Wi-Fi is strong and reliable, offering convenience for remote work. The views around the hotel are beautiful, creating a peaceful and relaxing atmosphere. However, getting around on foot is quite difficult. Nevertheless, if you want to have a wonderful vacation in a clean and comfortable space, I highly recommend this place.

reviews.title: Kì nghỉ tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Khách sạn nằm trung tâm thành phố tiện lợi cho việc đi chơi và mua sắm. Phòng đẹp tiện nghi hiện đại. Nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.text: Đây là lần thứ 2 trong tháng tôi trải nghiệm tại nơi đây. Mọi thứ đều rất tốt khiến tôi cảm thấy rất hài lòng. Phòng mới và sạch, đẹp. Tuy nhiên có điểm trừ nhỏ là vị trí điều hoà của phòng này được lắp ở chân giường khiến gió lạnh luôn phả thẳng vào chỗ nằm dù có chỉnh swing lên hay xuống& ở mức gió thấp nhất. Không có cách nào để tôi có thể né luồng gió lạnh đó nên thật tiếc là qua đêm đó tôi đã bị ốm. Mong rằng phía khách sạn sẽ sớm có cách khắc phục.

reviews.title: tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: tôi check out sớm lúc 9h sáng và sau đó đi chơi đến 2h chiều về. Anh staff bố trí phòng nghỉ tạm cho chúng tôi do thời tiết quá khắc nghiệt gần 40 độ nên chúng tôi có một nơi để nghỉ tạm rất ổn. Rất cảm ơn đội ngũ nhân viên
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
When I checked in, there was a mix-up with my booking and someone else's, so I was told there was no breakfast. Actually, that's fine because I wanted to eat outside anyway. The room I stayed in had a leaking air conditioner, but because it was a holiday, they couldn't fix it right away. Oh, and I got charged for 2 bottles of water. Later, I heard the reception mention that there was free water in the room, so I was a bit surprised, but by then I had already paid and it was only 10,000 VND per bottle, so I didn't ask again. I just thought it was a bit funny. 
The hotel was clean, new, and beautiful. The staff were friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Khách sạn nằm ở trung tâm tp rất tiện để di chuyển.KS mới sạch sẽ, thiết kế độc đáo rất đẹp.Nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt t
reviews.positives: Thiết kế đẹp

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, very clean

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Tuyệt vời, giá cả hợp  lý, nhân  viên  thân thiện, khách sạn sạch đẹp gần phố cổ và có nhiều  nhà hàng quanh khách sạn.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Good location, good room, everything was clean, flexible time to get breakfast. They were kind, they allow me to make the check in before 2pm

reviews.title: Good price!
reviews.positives: Room size, location & cost of room. Room design was also nice
reviews.negatives: Ants in the bathroom & bed. Also hair on the bed sheets. Air con didn’t work properly

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The hotel is quiet, clean, fully equipped, about 1km away from the walking street, the breakfast has few options but is decent, check-in/out is quick, and the staff is enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: The hotel was very clean and comfortable, the room was bright with good linen. The bathroom and shower were good. Only downside was we had a kettle and tea & coffee. But nothing to drink it from !! No cups & saucers and no sugar. The only thing we could use were to mugs from the bathroom that had no handles and got to hot to pick up. These were put back in the bathroom each day by the cleaners ?

reviews.title: Phòng sạch sẽ
reviews.text:
Phòng sạch sẽ
Đi lại thuận tiện

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Bathing
reviews.negatives: Poor shower drainage

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, the staff is enthusiastic, and the breakfast buffet is delicious and ample. The only downside is that the drainage in the bathroom is poorly constructed, with no slope, so the floor is always flooded with water. Other than that, everything is fine and I will stay again next time.

reviews.title: Good hotel in the main hub of nihn binh.
reviews.positives: Great hotel, breakfast options limited but still good. It's in the main city but away from the inner city chaos. Of you want to go for the whole tourist vibe I would suggest tam coc to stay in. It was what I was after though so perfect for me

reviews.title: Amazing for Groups
reviews.text: Ordered three rooms with 2 king beds (which is already insane). They even have a very decent breakfast included. Good job 👍
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Too small space inside but stuff tries its best and service is good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Too small rooms

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Room was clean & comfortable. The staff were most helpful.
reviews.negatives: There wasn’t  much around the hotel in terms of restaurants and bars.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel has a good location which is near Hoa Lu ancient town. The staff is helpful. The room sastified me with cleanness, full facilities. Absolutely recommendation, and come back in the next time

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff was great.. you need to have google translator though to communicate. They helped me with booking a bus to Hanoi..hotel was was well maintained and located in a quiet area..

reviews.title: Very good, clean and good service
reviews.text: Super recommend for those travelling to Ninh Binh to stay here

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very new! Very pretty rooms! Great staff!

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Vị trí đẹp, trung tâm thành phố, tiện đi lại, trang thiết bị ổn, phòng sạch sẽ, nhân viên nhiệt tình

reviews.title: A very enjoyable stay.
reviews.positives: I highly recommend Mona Paris Hotel. We booked the hotel at short notice and staff were very helpful settling us in. It’s in a terrific location in a quiet, leafy area with plenty of restaurants options nearby.  It’s close to the central part of Ninh Binh and a short drive/ride to sightseeing spots.
reviews.negatives: Nothing I didn’t like.

reviews.title: The hotel is clean and conveniently located.
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located, close to the old town of Hoa Lu, near many good restaurants. The rooms are clean, fully equipped with necessary amenities, and the staff is enthusiastic. Overall, it's worth staying at; I will choose this hotel again if I return!

reviews.title: Neat clean and luxurious
reviews.positives: The front desk staff was very friendly and helpful. The hotel is new and the rooms are clean and luxurious.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Great hotel

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Great hotel

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Exellent services. Worth the money

reviews.title: Great stay and recommnded
reviews.text:
I had experienced great stay at the hotel. Very nice and cleaned room. Location of the hotel is also good.  
Hotel staff is very supportive and helpful. 
I am surely recommending the hotel for stay.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room is clean and comfortable, close to the old town with easy access. The breakfast offers a variety of dishes, making it worth staying at the hotel.

reviews.title: 10 điểm không có nhưng cho nơi cư trú
reviews.text:
Khách sạn đẹp ở vị trí đắc địa.
Nhân viên thân thiện.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Good service

reviews.title: It's amazing to have luck in booking a hotel here.
reviews.text: The design style is very modern, clean, and meticulous down to the smallest detail, the receptionist is very cute and attentive. I was very happy to find that the air conditioning was already turned on and cool in the room, the food was plentiful and thoughtful, and the location is convenient for moving around. If I get the chance to visit Ninh Binh, I will return here!

reviews.title: Beautiful room,
reviews.text: Clean, the night receptionist is very helpful, there were no booked rooms left but they upgraded my room.

reviews.title: Wonderful experience here
reviews.text: The location is very convenient, close to many attractive attractions and has a beautiful view. The rooms are clean and spacious, creating a comfortable feeling. The staff is friendly, always ready to help when needed. However, the Wi-Fi is a bit unstable, but this does not significantly affect the overall experience. All of these make this place truly worth it for your trip.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Castle View

reviews.title: Chất lượng tốt
reviews.text: Chất lượng tốt so với giá tiền. Phòng rộng rãi và mới. Nhân viên thân thiện

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel and close to the center.
reviews.text: The hotel is very airy and clean, and it has a bathtub, which gives it extra points. It's quite close to the center and tourist attractions (near the Old Quarter and Trang An). There are a few restaurants and grocery stores around the hotel, so people will have to walk a little down to the center to find better dining and entertainment options.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good staff...helped us in every possible way....clean room and washroom... very nice breakfast..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Convenient location, close to tourist attractions, ample parking space, spacious, clean and beautiful rooms, friendly staff.

reviews.title: Moma Paris review
reviews.text: I booked a room on short notice with a group of friends. The staff were enthusiastic, lovely, pleasant, and friendly. Next time I will return to Moma Paris because the rooms are cheap, beautiful, and close to the center. ❤️

reviews.title: 2-day experience
reviews.text: The reception is enthusiastic. Good welcome, clean and tidy room. The bed is spacious, the bathroom has a large bathtub and a standing shower. I am very satisfied.

reviews.title: Worth staying.
reviews.text:
Good rooms and services, convenient transportation center. Regular guests still stay at this hotel when coming to Ninh Bình.  
Rate from Trần Công Thái

reviews.title: 部屋が素敵だった
reviews.text:
部屋が綺麗だった
ただ、お湯でシャワー出すと水圧が全然無かった所は残念だった(使い方が悪かった可能性もある)
スタッフの人はとても親切
ホアルーにも近くてまた泊まりたいと思った

reviews.title: Excellent hotel and service
reviews.text: Everything was great especially storing my luggage and allowing us to have a shower at end of the day before our overnight train ride.  Thanks Moma Paris

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the very center, easy to find, and convenient for traveling to other tourist spots. The room is clean, new, so I am very satisfied. It has all the amenities and the staff is very attentive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is enthusiastic and helpful from A to Z 🥹 With a low price, the room is great, the food is decent, and the location is close to the city, making it very convenient to get around.

reviews.title: Recommend
reviews.text: Very clean, comfortable bed and nice shower. Good location

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotel is new and clean. The staff is enthusiastic and friendly. There are many delicious restaurants near the hotel, convenient for families traveling. The breakfast is clean and tasty. Next time I come back to NB, I will choose to stay here again.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Lễ tân khách sạn rất nhiệt tình, dễ thương
reviews.text: Sau khi review về chỗ ở, lễ tân khách sạn có nhắn tin cho mình. Thấy các bạn cũng nhiệt tình, dễ thương, mình muốn gỡ review trước mà không được nên sẽ viết thêm 1 review 10/10 ở đây nhé.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Tốt
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, sang xịn mịn. đầy đủ tiện nghi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new and clean hotel is located in the city center with many dining and entertainment spots. The staff is friendly and very helpful. Next time I come to NB, I will definitely choose this hotel as my place to stay.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: The hotel had great rooms and was totally loving it
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Castle View

reviews.title: Nice place
reviews.text: Very calm place and good matured staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Booking a cheaper room on Agoda, and it turned out to be a clean and really nice room with full amenities. I reserved a twin room but since it was fully booked, I got upgraded to a deluxe room with a bathtub. 💯

reviews.title: The room is very nice.
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, beautifully designed, and located in a residential area, so it's very peaceful. The location in the center of Ninh Binh city makes it quite convenient to go anywhere.

reviews.title: Nice hotel in the city center
reviews.text: Convenient for my family to stay and visit our relatives

reviews.title: Sự lựa chọn hợp lý cho kì nghỉ gia đình tại trung tâm Ninh Bình
reviews.text: Vị trí trung tâm, ngay gần phố cổ Hoa Lư và các quán ăn địa phương nổi tiếng. Đi Hoa Lư và Tràng An, Bái Đính hết khoảng hơn 10km. Dịch vụ tốt, nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt tình. Có buffet sáng, trẻ con rất thích ăn. Phòng sạch sẽ, thơm tho.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good!!!

reviews.title: great location, high value
reviews.text: great location, high value, easy parking

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text: Very nice stay!

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: Good price,nice room,close to center.

reviews.title: Great and quiet
reviews.text: The hotel room was exceptionally quiet, providing a peaceful environment ideal for rest after a busy day. Its location was highly convenient, with easy access to public transportation, nearby restaurants, and key attractions. The room was clean, well-maintained, and equipped with all the necessary amenities, making the stay comfortable and hassle-free. Overall, it was an excellent choice for both relaxation and convenience.

reviews.title: Worth experiencing
reviews.text:
Location: 9/10  
Very easy to find and especially very close to Hoa Lu Old Quarter - you can walk to the old town. The only drawback is that it's a bit far from other sightseeing spots, about 5 km away.  
Cleanliness: 10/10  
The room is clean and comfortable.  
Service: 10/10  
Staff is super friendly and enthusiastic.  
Breakfast: An extra charge of 40k, but it’s not very special.  
Overall, it's worth the experience and suitable for the price. Definitely will come back.

reviews.title: Excellent choice
reviews.text: The rooms are clean, comfortable, the staff is enthusiastic, and the location is convenient, close to the ancient street of Hoa Lu. Everything is good, I haven't tried breakfast yet, so I can't evaluate it.

reviews.title: The hotel is nice, and the staff is enthusiastic.
reviews.text: The hotel near the ancient town of Hoa Lu is very convenient to access. It's close to Trang An. It's not too far to get to Tam Coc since the road is nice and not crowded. Reasonable prices for the location and amenities. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Phòng đẹp, thiết kế đẹp, nội thất đẹp, tiện nghi đầy đủ, vị trí gần trung tâm, cách phố cổ Hoa Lư gần 1km, nhân viên nhiệt tình, giá tiền hợp lý khi đặt qua Agoda, dịch vụ giặt sấy cũng tốt

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I am really very satisfied with my experience at the hotel. It is luxurious, clean, has good amenities, and the decor is very beautiful. The staff is very gentle and attentive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, clean, and well-equipped. The staff are all lovely and very dedicated, and Mr. Thai was very helpful to our group during our stay here, providing reasonable suggestions for places to eat and play.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Hien Vu
reviews.text: We stay 1 night to see old town at nighttime,very new elegant hotel not far from city center but nice and quiet, staff is friendly and helpful, from here we can get taxi go around all attractions of Ninh Binh

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We stayed for a short time since we missed all the rides from Ninh binh to Hanoi. But the staff there was helpful with information regarding the places we could go to at night and also info for the rides going back to Hanoi.

reviews.title: Beautiful room, fully equipped.
reviews.text: The hotel is beautiful, close to the old town (about 1 km away). The breakfast has a few items; I just had the crab noodle soup and found it quite tasty. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Beautiful and well-equipped guest room.
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel, close to the old town (about 1km away). The breakfast is a bit limited, I just had the crab noodle soup and found it quite delicious. Friendly and enthusiastic staff.

reviews.title: Best Hotel in Ninh Binh
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and modern, with beautiful rooms in the city center. Good service and the staff are very enthusiastic, providing a pleasant feeling. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Chỗ nghỉ tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Khách sạn mới đẹp, sạch sẽ. Nhân viên nhiệt tình và thân thiện. Vị trí khách sạn nằm ở trung tâm nên thuận tiện đi lại, xung quanh có nhiều tiện ích, an ninh tốt. Gia đình tôi đã ở đây nhiều lần và luôn chọn Moma Paris để nghỉ mỗi khi về Ninh Bình.

reviews.title: Just feeel like home
reviews.text: The hotel in a goood location, then rooom is spacious, brealfast are very good, bed are big and super comfy. I really like the bedroom with tube ..

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: New hotel, clean, and very friendly staff. The service here is a perfect 10; we were upgraded from one large room to two pretty decent rooms. They also offer motorbike and car rentals (cheaper than taking a taxi if there are more than 4 people). The hotel's location is in the city center, close to the Old Quarter of Hoa Lu, and it's quite convenient to get to other famous tourist spots. We were also assisted with late check-out at no extra charge. Overall, this is a hotel worth experiencing if you visit Ninh Binh, everyone.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Rất tốt
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch, vị trí tiện, lễ tân và ng dọn dẹp làm nhanhhhh
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Very good!
reviews.text: I booked a family room here, the room is very clean, the facilities are new so there is a slight smell of fresh paint, but it doesn't affect much. The staff is very helpful, the breakfast buffet is also very delicious, I would recommend it to friends if they come to Ninh Bình.

reviews.title: Spacious, clean, convenient.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, luxurious, clean, and fully equipped. It is located in a quiet residential area, close to the Old Quarter, with several good eateries nearby (Singapore claypot rice, Ly Quoc Su Pho, etc.). The laundry cost is a bit high (250,000 VND for a bag/basket of children's clothes).

reviews.title: New, clean, and nice
reviews.text:
I think it’s a new hotel because everything looks so new and clean. Quiet neighborhood, nice staff, beautiful rooms and decoration.
Big room with  2 queen size beds for group of 4 is a plus.
Will be my pick when I’m in town next time👍👍👍

reviews.title: Great accomodation !!!
reviews.text: The staff were friendly and very supportive. The hotel is located in the center of Ninh Binh, very easy to get a cab and move between destinations. The room is large, clean and equipped thoughtfully. Very nice experience!!!

reviews.title: New and nice
reviews.text:
It’s a new place so everything is super clean.  Close to all the attractions in town.
Very nice staffs and very helpful. They knew that we gotta go early so they tried to make sure we had breakfast before leaving.
 We got it with an affordable price, I think because they’re still new.
Good choice for family or couple.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text:
Khách sạn sạch sẽ, nhân viên nhiệt tình , anh Tiệp tiếp tân tiếp đãi rất chu đáo, phòng sạch sẽ, khách sạn mới
The hotel is clean n new ,  staffs are really friendly n helpful,  the location is convenient n quiet , a good place to stay

reviews.title: Hotel muy cómodo y de precio competitivo
reviews.text: La habitación tiene 30m² con dos camas grandes, aseo limpio y cómodo, con ducha, aire acondicionado, ascensor, bien situado y un precio muy atractivo

reviews.title: De passage à Ninh Binh
reviews.text: Bel emplacement dans un ancien quartier de Ninh Binh et à proximité des activités culturelles de la région. L'hôtel est propre et bien entretenu. Le petite déjeuner est très bien également.

reviews.title: Presque parfait
reviews.text: Très bon hôtel avec tout le standing d'un bel hôtel parisien, je m'y suis senti comme chez moi et le personnel a été super en me laissant la chambre à 9h au lieu de 14h sans payer de supplément, je recommande fortement

reviews.title: Grande chambre
reviews.text:
Hôtel dans le centre ville 
Grande chambre propre bien équipée 
Bel hôtel 
Bon petit déjeuner (mélange occidental et vietnamien)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Route était parfait

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Le rapport qualité prix est imbattable, la chambre est propre et spacieuse. L’accueil et le service est impeccable. Le quartier est calme.

reviews.title: Je vous le recommande !
reviews.text: Un hôtel au top, très bien placé et un accueil de qualité ! Merci

reviews.title: Very poor breakfast and everything cold.
reviews.text: Had very noisy Vietnamese guests right next door screaming nearly whole night and slashing doors at 5 a.m. and screaming again. Nobody cares....

reviews.title: Clean and luxury looking...
reviews.text: ...but better go for breakfast somewhere else.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Castle View

reviews.title: Wir haben verlängert
reviews.text: Gutes Preis Leistungsverältnis. Frühstück okay. Schicke Zimmer. 24 Euro im DZ mit Badewanne.

reviews.title: Empfehlung
reviews.text: Wir haben verlängert. Tolles PL Verhältnis

reviews.title: Schicke Hütte
reviews.text: Wir haben verlängert. Das Preis Leistungsverhältnis ist Top. DZ um die 23 Euro in der Woche. Frühstück gut. Aufmerksames und Serviceorientiertes Personal.

reviews.title: Hotel Moma Paris
reviews.text: Ich kann es weiteremfehlen
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Es war super sauber und sehr nette Personal

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Hotel non nuovissimo e abbastanza trascurato ma accettabile considerato che il prezzo della camera era molto conveniente. Verificate la pulizia della biancheria perché appena arrivato ho dovuto chiedere la sostituzione in quanto i cuscini erano sporchi. Personale molto gentile anche se parlano un inglese molto elementare

reviews.title: Nella norma
reviews.text: Hotel tenuto bene ma non nuovissimo come sembra nelle foto. Buona la posizione. La colazione è limitata ma il cibo è  di qualità. Gli asciugamani sono datati per cui dopo averli utilizzati qualche volta non servono più a nulla. Ottimo il condizionatore,il materasso è il phon. Ottimo lo staff. Tutto sommato lo consiglierei se costasse molto meno dei 40 euro a notte che ho speso io.
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: Cute place to sleep
reviews.text: Nice new hotel, rooms are pretty decorated in a French nouveau style, good breakfast and located near where I had to take bus to Hanoi, a receptionist couldn’t speak English but he was very available and ready to help for any request, highly recommend

reviews.title: Perfect hotel
reviews.text: De kamers zijn super mooi en schoon. Daarnaast is het personeel heel erg vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Het ontbijt  is prima! De foto's zijn recent gemaakt!

reviews.title: 素晴らしいと
reviews.text: 素晴らしい

reviews.title: very good
reviews.text: My family and I were very impressed with our stay at this hotel. I recommend it to everyone. You won't be disappointed.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Castle View

reviews.title: 진짜 잠만 자기 위한 숙소
reviews.text:
장점 : 없음
단점 :
1. 샤워실 물이 하수구로 빠지지 않아 샤워 후 물바다 구경 할수 있음
2. 창가에 방수가 안되었는지 우중에 빗물이 줄줄 들어옴
3. 호아루 올드타운 위치가 도보ㆍ그랩 등 이용시 애매한 위치임
4. 주변 상권 없음
5. 조식이 거의 없다고 보면 됨
    (한국인 입장-쌀국수ㆍ식빵ㆍ계란후라이ㆍ커피 정도...단무지ㆍ햄 없는 김밥)
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: 특별할곳 없는장소
reviews.text: 그냥 하루자기에는 적당한 그러나 가격은 결코 싸지 않다

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 욕실에 뜨거운 물이 나오지 않는 것 빼고는 가격 대비 괜찮았습니다.

reviews.title: 깨끗하고 예쁜 새 호텔이에요.
reviews.text: 하노이에서 타고 온 리무진 밴 사무실이 가까이에 있어 편의상 예약을 했어요. 보니까 호텔 주변에 다른 리무진 밴 사무실도 여럿 있더라고요.  도보로 3분 정도? 아침 식사는 주문식인데 아주 간단, 그 자체입니다. 푸짐하지 않아서 조금 실망했고요. 주변에 식당이나 카페는 몇 있습니다. 자전거를 빌리려고 했는데 호텔 자체 소유는 없고 다른 데서 가져 와야 한다더라고요. 오토바이는 딱 1대가 있다는데 가격이 저렴하지 않아서 그냥 구글맵으로 자전거 빌려주는 곳을 찾아가 빌렸어요. 닌빈 시내에 호아르 관광지구를 만들어 놓은 곳이 있는데 가까워서 걸어갈 수 있습니다.

reviews.title: 친절해요
reviews.text: 객실 넓고 좋아요

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 좋았어요
reviews.room_type: Luxury Family View Room with Balcony

reviews.title: 만족
reviews.text:
가격대비 만족합니다.
방 깨끗하고, 직원들 엄청 친절해요.
일찍 도착했는데 체크인전 잠시 쉴수있게 무료로 임시 방도줬어요

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 건물과 객실의 상태는 좋고, 시내에 있어서 위치도 좋으나 아침 조식이 부실함.

reviews.title: 괜찮아요.
reviews.text:
괜찮은 호텔입니다.
닌빈에 가서 숙박을 하면 이 호텔에 머물러도 좋습니다.

reviews.title: 친절한 링에게 감사
reviews.text: 숙소는 깨끗하고 거리도 잘 정리돼 있고, 가성비가 훌륭했습니다. 무엇보다도 지원들이 친절했구요. 특히 프론트에 근무하는 링이 잘 챙겨주고 친절했습니다. 다음에 기회가 있으면 또 가게될듯....

reviews.title: 너무 만족합니다
reviews.text:
직원과 소통에 어려움 없고, 매우 친절하고 가격도 조렴한데 조식까지 훌륭합니다.
근처에 식당도 많고 위치도 괜찮습니다.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Spacious and comfortable
앞선것과 같이 좋았어요

reviews.title: 좋았어요
reviews.text:
친절하고 가격대비 무난하고 깨끗하고
불만스러울점이 안보이네요

reviews.title: 깔끔하고 저렴한 숙소
reviews.text: 샤워기 필터 갈변 안됨…조식 맛남…무료 와이파이 성능도 좋음…직원들도 친절함

reviews.title: 가성비좋은호텔
reviews.text:
이벤트당첨으로4000원에 숙박했는데
시설이 모두 새것이고 퀄리티 최곱니다

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Vào hỏi sát mặt lễ tân mới trả lời. Giường k thay ga và chăn có những vết bẩn và bụi trên giường đã phủi kĩ nhưng đêm nằm vẫn bị ngứa ng khó ngủ

reviews.title: Quá nhiều vấn đề
reviews.text:
Nước yếu, không có vòi hoa sen. Chỉ có vòi xịt rất nhỏ kèm theo bồn tắm nên không thể tắm bình thường được. Bồn tắm cũng bỏ không sử dụng được do không biết bao giờ mới đầy nước. (Mặc dù có nhân viên kỹ thuật khắc phục nước yếu nhưng chỉ  cải thiện được khoảng 20%).
Điều hoà bật 16 độ chế độ Cool cũng chỉ thấy hơi mát.
Trên ghế cuối giường có nhiều vết dịch trắng đã khô lại (như vết dịch khi quan hệ không được tẩy rửa hết)
Không ổn!
reviews.response:
Dear Anh  Thai,
Chúng tôi lấy làm tiếc khi kỳ nghỉ của anh tại khách sạn  Moma Paris Hotel không được như mong đợi,cảm ơn anh đã thẳng thắn góp ý để khách sạn khắc phục nhằm nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ cho những khách sau, mong anh thông cảm và hiểu cho là các các lỗi kĩ thuật thi thoảng có thể xẩy ra và chúng tôi đã khắc phục hoàn toàn rồi. Chúc anh và gia đình luôn mạnh khoẻ  một lần nữa thay mặt khách sạn Xin Lỗi và cảm ơn những đóng góp ý kiến của anh
Quản Lý: Nguyễn Văn Tiệp.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, dễ thương, thái độ phục vụ tốt. Nhưng cơ sở vật chất trong phòng cũ, không như bề ngoài và trên hình ảnh, với cơ sở này thì giá cao so với mặt bằng chung

reviews.title: Chê nhẹ
reviews.text: Phòng tắm thoát sàn kém. Bị đọng nước. Khách sạn dùng sữa tắm với dầu gội tốt hơn, dùng dầu gội bị rít tóc.

reviews.title: Ở tạm thì ổn. Ở sạch đẹp thì ko.
reviews.text: Khách sạn hơi giống nhà nghỉ. Đi du lịch theo nhóm thì đc. Ở đẹp thì hơi bẩn và cũ.

reviews.title: Sai sót trong phục vụ
reviews.text: Vào ngày 6/3 mình thuê phòng 1 đêm là tới 12h ngày 7/3 mới check out, thế nhưng vào lúc 10h ngày 7/3 mình đang trong phòng thì k biết do lễ tân làm việc thế nào mà tự dưng đâu ra 2 bạn khách cầm thẻ phòng mở cửa đi vào hồn nhiên dù trc đó mình đã khoá cửa kĩ càng. Dù bên khách sạn đã xin lỗi nhưng đối với 1 ngành dịch vụ thì việc này không bao giờ đc diễn ra và mình cũng rất tụt mood ngay lúc đó nên mình đánh giá vậy để mng lưu ý hơn.

reviews.title: Vị trí ok phòng ốc và tiện nghi hơi cũ
reviews.text:
Vị trí rất trung tâm
Gần nhiều quán ăn ngon
Tuy nhiên phòng ốc và tiện nghi hơi cũ 
Nhìn chung ok với giá phòng

Nội thất đẹp, vị trí thuận tiện

reviews.text: Nhân viên thân thiện nhiệt tình, phòng nhỏ vừa phải.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, giá rẻ, nhưng nhà tắm k xây gờ chặn nước, nên tắm xong là nước ướt hết toàn bộ nhà vệ sinh luôn, hơi bất tiện chút. Phòng cách âm hơi kém, người đi ngoài hành lang nói chuyện, bên trong nghe rõ như đang ở bên cạnh luôn

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Vị trí thuận tiện đi lại, khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ. Tuy nhiên chăn gối không thơm lắm, khách sạn cải thiện được vấn đề này là ok.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Khách sạn đáng giá tiền với địa điểm thuận tiện và dễ dàng đi bộ đến các điểm tham quan. Nhân viên thân thiện và phục vụ tận tâm. Phong sạch sẽ và tiện nghi đầy đủ. Chỗ đỗ xe cũng khá thuận tiện
